name: Virtual Tee Systems LLC
address: 204 Mt View Ln #2B, Colorado Springs, CO 80907
about: Virtual Tee Systems LLC specializes in custom home golf simulators, offering a realistic indoor golf experience that closely replicates being on a course. They provide a complete service from consultation and design to installation, focusing on innovative designs, premium materials, and an impeccable finish. Operating across the lower 48 states from their Denver headquarters, they serve a diverse range of clients with expertise in space planning, equipment selection, and course feature integration.
why_golfers_like_it: Complete one-stop solution from consultation to installation
Custom builds with premium materials and impeccable finishes
Expert guidance on equipment selection and space planning
Luxury golf simulator builders with industry-leading knowledge

food_and_drink.notes: Commercial setups include golf simulator bars and full kitchens for food service.
Commercial venues feature bars and alcoholic beverages are part of the offering.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether you need to bring your own clubs, but it mentions expert guidance in selecting the right equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: While the commercial golf simulator bars offer food and drink, the website does not explicitly state if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time it takes to complete 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly features or if children can use the facilities.
